title: Apply for funding under the Foreign Credential Recognition Program - Innovation and skilled newcomer employment: Apply - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply for funding under the Foreign Credential Recognition Program - Innovation and skilled newcomer employment: Apply
From: Employment and Social Development Canada
- 3. How to complete your application
- 5. After you've applied
Your application must be submitted by Thursday, April 11,  2019, at 2:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Applications received after this deadline will  not be considered further. Only one project per organization will be reviewed. You must provide  your answers in a document that is compatible with Microsoft Word, as described  in the section How  to complete your application . Any documents submitted that are not  requested as part of this application process will not be reviewed.

### Submit  your application
- You can submit your application by email to NC-DGOP-POB-RTCE-FCR-GD2@servicecanada.gc.ca .
- You can submit your application by mail to the  address below. Your package must be postmarked by Canada Post or a mail carrier  of your choosing by the closing date of the call.
Note: Applications cannot be submitted through other means,  including cloud storage service providers such as Dropbox or Google Drive.  Applications sent using such means will not be retained.
Foreign Credential Recognition Program Coordination Unit, Mailstop 402 National Grants & Contributions Delivery Centre (ESDC) 140 Promenade du Portage, Phase IV, 4th Floor Gatineau, Quebec  K1A 0J9

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
